SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft

Interface Writable

All Known Implementing Classes:
CoffBytes, CoffHeader, CoffRelocationTable, CoffSection, CoffSectionTable, CoffStringTable, CoffSymbolTable, ElfAbiFlags_Mips, ElfGroup, ElfHeader, ElfNoBits, ElfNullSection, ElfProgBits, ElfRegInfo_Mips, ElfRelaTable, ElfRelTable, ElfSection, ElfSectionTable, ElfStringTable, ElfSymbolTable, OmfFile
public interface Writable
Interface for objects that can be written to an output stream at a specific offset.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getLength()
    Returns the length in bytes of this object's serialized form.
    long
    getOffset()
    Returns the file offset where this object should be written.
    void
    write(OutputStream outputStream)
    Writes this object to the given output stream.
    static void
    write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream)
    Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with zero bytes.
    static void
    write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream, int padding)
    Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with a specified padding byte.

  • Method Details

    • getOffset

      long getOffset()
      Returns the file offset where this object should be written.
      Returns:
      the file offset in bytes

    • getLength

      long getLength()
      Returns the length in bytes of this object's serialized form.
      Returns:
      the serialized length in bytes

    • write

      void write(OutputStream outputStream) throws IOException
      Writes this object to the given output stream.
      Parameters:
      outputStream - the stream to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • write

      static void write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream) throws IOException
      Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with zero bytes.
      Parameters:
      writables - collection of objects to write
      outputStream - stream to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • write

      static void write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream, int padding) throws IOException
      Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with a specified padding byte.
      Parameters:
      writables - collection of objects to write
      outputStream - stream to write to
      padding - byte value to use for padding between objects
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails
